Greateson (顺佳兴)
Official website: https://greateson.com

About
- Founded: 2008
- Headquarters: Foshan, Guangdong, China
- Factory area: 10,000 square meters
- Team size: 80+
- Main markets: Middle East, Europe, Southeast Asia

Core offerings
- Stainless steel decorative screen
- Stainless steel display cabinet
- Stainless steel decorative sheet
- Stainless steel honeycomb panel

Capabilities
- 11 integrated production lines
- PVD coating, etching, embossing, sandblasting, brushing
- Honeycomb panel lamination
- Laser cutting, CNC bending, V-grooving
- OEM / ODM custom engineering support

Primary site sections
- /en/products
- /en/applications
- /en/cases
- /en/factory
- /en/faq
- /zh/products
- /zh/applications
- /zh/cases
- /zh/factory
- /zh/faq
